---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "Setup, notation, and a Bayes-vs-classical reference"
page-type: orientation
toc: true
---

Reference material that supports the weekly notes and labs. These pages are public, ungraded
companions; the LMS is authoritative for anything graded.

- [R · VS Code · Quarto setup](r-vscode-quarto-setup.qmd) — install the toolchain, make R discoverable
  by Quarto, and render your first reproducible report.
- [Notation glossary](notation-glossary.qmd) — the fixed symbols and conventions the course commits to,
  so a symbol never means two things.
- [Bayes vs. classical cheatsheet](bayes-vs-classical-cheatsheet.qmd) — a side-by-side reference for the
  statements each framework makes and what each one means.

More resources (a package list, a project guide) will be posted in the LMS as the term proceeds.
